title: Olive Flatbread
description: Enjoy a simple and delicious Mediterranean-inspired flatbread topped with crunchy olives. This snack is perfect for a quick bite or as an appetizer.
instructions: Place the flatbread on a baking sheet.
Top the flatbread with kalamata olives and crunchy feta cheese.
Bake for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
